title: Register a grievance with required details and see confirmation
description: This verifies that a student can open the grievance form, provide category, description, and urgency, submit it, and see a registration confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a grievance confirmation is visible

title: Ask a question in student chat and receive an answer
description: This verifies that a student can open chat on the student portal, send a question, and receive an assistant response.

steps.description: Type a question into the chat input
Verify an assistant answer is displayed

title: Send a chat question by pressing Enter
description: This verifies that a student can submit a chat message with the keyboard and receive an assistant response.

steps.description: Type a question into the chat input
Verify an assistant answer is displayed

title: Open the landing page and navigate to the student portal
description: This verifies that a user can start on the landing page and reach the student portal without being blocked.

steps.description: Click the link to the student portal
Verify the student portal is displayed

title: Submit a grievance with a different urgency level
description: This verifies that a student can register a grievance using another valid urgency selection and still complete submission successfully.

steps.description: Select a different grievance urgency level
Verify a grievance confirmation is visible

title: Open the landing page and navigate to the admin panel
description: This verifies that a user can start on the landing page and reach the admin panel without being blocked.

steps.description: Click the link to the admin panel
Verify the admin panel is displayed

title: Ask a follow-up question in the same chat session
description: This verifies that a student can continue the conversation with a follow-up question and receive another assistant response.

steps.description: Type a question into the chat input
Type a follow-up question into the chat input
Verify a follow-up assistant answer is displayed

title: Open the landing page and navigate to the department portal
description: This verifies that a user can start on the landing page and reach the department portal without being blocked.

steps.description: Click the link to the department portal
Verify the department portal is displayed

title: Submit a long chat question and receive a response
description: This verifies that a student can send a longer natural-language question in chat and still receive an assistant response.

steps.description: Type a long question into the chat input
Verify an assistant answer is displayed

title: Block grievance submission when required details are missing
description: This verifies that the grievance form shows validation feedback and does not submit when required details are incomplete.

steps.description: Submit the grievance form without completing the required fields
Verify a grievance validation error is visible
Verify the grievance is not registered

title: Submit an empty chat message and stay in the conversation
description: This verifies that an empty chat input is not accepted as a valid user message and the chat remains available for correction.

steps.description: Submit an empty message from the chat input
Verify the chat input remains available
Verify no assistant answer is displayed for the empty submission
